title: InvoiceProcessor
intent: Intelligent invoice ingestion, extraction, validation, and approval routing
requirements: ingestion module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
extraction module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
matching module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
approval module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
exceptions module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
payments module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
